summary: This source is Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw's LinkedIn profile. It outlines her professional background as the founder and Chairperson of Biocon, her numerous global awards, and includes brief snippets of her posts advocating for biotechnology, R&D investment, and digital innovation in India. Because it is primarily a biographical profile and feed of short updates, it contains very little of her detailed thought processes or frameworks.

signature_quotes.text: As one of the most consequential discussions of our time, the conversation around #AI goes beyond technology to its profound impact on human lives…
signature_quotes.context: From a LinkedIn post discussing the impact of artificial intelligence.

signature_quotes.text: The budget provides a great opportunity to promote research and innovation in India.
signature_quotes.context: From an article snippet discussing expectations for the Union Budget.
